data.title: Maine's governor faces decision on first-in-nation AI data center ban, amid tough Senate race. Moratorium lasts over a year.
data.description: Maine is currently considering a moratorium on AI data centers that would be in effect for more than a year. The state's governor, who is entangled in a competitive Senate primary race, will need to decide whether to approve this legislation.

data.title: Bitnomial introduces Injective futures in US market, paving way for potential ETF inclusion after Canary Capital filing.
data.description: Injective has recently entered the US-regulated derivatives markets with new contracts. This move is significant as it represents the first step for Injective in this market. The contracts could potentially facilitate the launch of a spot ETF after Canary Capital filed a document. This development is essential for Injective's expansion, as it opens up opportunities in a highly regulated market. This strategic decision comes at a crucial time and showcases the company's commitment to growth and innovation.

data.title: Gevo Withdraws from Department of Energy Financing Process and is Developing Alternative Financing for its ATJ-30 Project
data.description: A top player in renewable fuels industry is making progress towards securing financing by the end of the year. The company is moving swiftly towards meeting its financial goals before the year's end, showcasing its leadership in the sector.

data.title: HOMB’s Top-Tier Performance Continues into 2026 with First Quarter Earnings of $118.2 Million, EPS of $0.60 and ROA of 2.09%
data.description: In Conway, Arkansas on April 15, 2026, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB) disclosed their quarterly financial results. Home BancShares is recognized as the parent organization of Centennial Bank.

data.title: Navajo Transitional Energy Company Receives Two National Awards for Safety Training and Mine Reclamation
data.description: NTEC, based in Broomfield, Colo., has been honored with two prestigious national awards from the Interstate Mining Compact Commission. The awards recognize NTEC's exemplary work in mine safety training and reclamation efforts at its Spring Creek Mine in southeastern Montana. Specifically, NTEC has been awarded the 2026 National Mine Safety and Health Training Award in the Industry Category – Coal Surface Mining. This recognition highlights the company's innovative Mandatory H&S Program.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Petlove/
data.description: Petlove has taken a significant step towards promoting environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives by achieving an unparalleled B Corp certification within the Brazilian pet industry. The certification was officially issued on April 14, 2026, by Petlove via PR Newswire. The company states that it is the pioneer in the sector to receive such recognition, highlighting its commitment to sustainable and responsible business practices. This move underscores Petlove's dedication to maintaining high ethical standards and prioritizing sustainability.

data.title: National Institute of Building Sciences Appoints Jade L. Rung, PE, PMP, as Chief Growth Officer
data.description: In Washington, on April 15, 2026, Jade L. Rung, PE, PMP, was appointed as the Chief Growth Officer (CGO) of the National Institute of Building Sciences (NIBS). Rung brings with her more than 30 years of experience in overseeing essential infrastructure projects. This appointment showcases NIBS's commitment to strategic development and leadership in the industry.

data.title: Emerita Announces Renewal of the Nuevo Tintillo Property Permit and Changes to Board of Directors
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Emerita Resources Corp. (TSX-V: EMO; OTCQX: EMOTF; FSE: LLJA) revealed that it has secured the renewal permit, known as Permiso de Investigación (“Investigation Permit”), for the Nuevo Tintillo property. This property comprises 227 mining claims covering a total of 6,874.2 hectares situated in the Iberian Pyrite Belt in Seville Province, Andalusia Region of southern Spain. The permit was granted by the General Registry of the Delegación Territorial de Economía, Hacienda y Fondos Europeos y de Política Industrial y Energía en Sevilla (Regional Government of Seville). The Investigation Permit spans a three-year period and can be extended for further terms by meeting the necessary regulatory criteria before the end of each three-year term.

data.title: Kalshi plans to introduce a parent portal to prevent underage access, CEO confirms.
data.description: CEO Tarek Mansour announced that Kalshi will introduce a parent portal and AI verification to prevent children from circumventing age restrictions by using a parent’s ID. This move aims to enhance the platform's security measures and address concerns related to underage users accessing the platform. The implementation of the parent portal and AI verification reflects Kalshi's commitment to ensuring a safe environment for users, with a focus on protecting youth.
NORTH KOREA LEADER KIM JONG UN HOLDS ARTILLERY FIRING CONTEST MARKING STATE FOUNDER KIM IL SUNG'S BIRTHDAY - KCNA

data.title: tomboyx Returns Controlling Interest to the Co-Founder, Announces New CEO and Creative Leadership
data.description: Fran Dunaway has returned to the helm in an active leadership role, supported by CEO Seujan Bertram and Chief Creative Officer James Ford, as they drive the brand towards its next phase of growth and design excellence. Based in SEATTLE, the renowned LGBTQ+ brand, tomboyx, is forging ahead under their guidance. The brand's commitment to disciplined expansion and innovative design is set to shape its future endeavors. This significant development comes as tomboyx solidifies its status as the leading direct-to-consumer LGBTQ+ brand, marking a pivotal moment in its journey.

data.title: RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust Announces April 2026 Distribution
data.description: In Toronto, RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: REI.UN) revealed a distribution of 9.65 cents per unit for April. Scheduled for May 7, 2026, the distribution applies to unitholders recorded as of April 30, 2026. RioCan caters to Canadian shopping requirements by owning, managing, and developing essential retail properties in densely inhabited areas. Their portfolio, as of December 31, 2025, comprises a significant number of such properties.

data.title: Virtus Introduces Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF
data.description: In a recent announcement, Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. (NYSE: VRTS) unveiled the Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF (NYSE Arca: DPRE), managed by Duff & Phelps Investment Management Co. This move marks an expansion of their actively managed exchange-traded funds range. The newly introduced fund is the 25th ETF available through Virtus' multi-manager ETF platform, Virtus ETF Solutions. The Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF's objective is to provide investors with a unique offering in the market.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Houston-based Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC), a key player in providing production optimization, artificial lift, and emissions management solutions for the oil and natural gas sector, is set to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes on May 6, 2026, before the market opens. Subsequently, a conference call will be held on the same day at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The live call can be accessed over the phone.

data.title: Ashland schedules Q2 2026 earnings release and conference call webcast.
data.description: A new report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.5%. This marks the lowest rate in 50 years, with job growth continuing to rise. The economy also added over 200,000 jobs last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, wages have seen an increase of 3.1% compared to last year. This positive trend is seen as a reflection of the strong economy and job market in the country.

data.title: Allegiant and Sun Country Achieve Key Regulatory Milestone with DOT Approval
data.description: Allegiant Travel Company (NASDAQ: ALGT) and Sun Country Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNCY) have received an exemption from the U.S. Department of Transportation that permits both airlines to maintain operations under common ownership. The exemption was granted on April 15, 2026. This decision enables the two airlines to continue their services without disruption due to their shared ownership structure.

data.title: PMET Launches Relationship with Koch Technology Solutions to Advance Value-Added Caesium Chemicals from Shaakichiuwaanaan
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Montreal, it was announced that on April 16, 2026, in Sydney, Australia, Koch Technology Solutions, a division of Koch Inc., will be assessing innovative processing methods for PMET's valuable caesium deposit on a global scale. The initiative includes the initiation of a crucial caesium testing program in collaboration with Koch Technology.

data.title: Aetherflux Appoints Brad Koenig to Advisory Board
data.description: Located in San Carlos, California, Aetherflux, an orbital energy infrastructure company founded by Baiju Bhatt, has revealed the addition of Brad Koenig to its Advisory Board. The appointment of Koenig comes at a crucial time as Aetherflux gears up for the launch of its initial orbital data center project in the first quarter of 2027. In his new capacity, Koenig will offer strategic insights on commercial strategy and roadmap, playing a key role in expediting the journey to market for advanced computing solutions.

data.title: Allegion Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a prominent global security products and solutions provider, has revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.55 per ordinary share of the company. Shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 30, 2026. Allegion specializes in creating advanced security and access solutions to ensure safety in various environments where individuals reside, study, work, and interact.

data.title: Wrtn Technologies Unveils its AI Interactive Storytelling Platform ‘OOC: The Playable Anime’ in North America
data.description: A consumer AI company called Wrtn Technologies has recently revealed the launch of OOC in North America. OOC is an AI character chat and interactive storytelling platform that aims to revolutionize the way users engage with content. This launch signifies Wrtn Technologies' commitment to providing innovative solutions in the field of AI, catering to the North American market. This platform offers a unique experience by combining chat functionality with interactive storytelling elements. It is set to offer users a new way to interact with AI technology, marking a significant advancement in the industry. This North American launch demonstrates the company's focus on expanding its reach and offering cutting-edge products to a wider audience.
